_meta.purpose: VMA Group's PROOF points for the Pitch Pack's 'Track record & why VMA' section. Retained search is a trust purchase: 'who have you placed?' is the most-asked question in any pitch, and the pack had no answer. This is the single place to hold VMA's real, APPROVED credentials.
_meta.how_it_renders: The 'positioning' line (true today) always renders. Any field still containing square brackets [ ] is treated as an unfilled placeholder: the pack shows the section but adds a visible 'complete before sending' guard so a half-finished proof section can never go to a client looking final. Replace every [bracketed] item with real, approved figures/placements/quotes and the guard disappears.
_meta.warning: Do NOT invent statistics. Use only figures VMA can stand behind. Anonymise placements so no candidate or client is identifiable without consent.

comms.positioning: VMA Group is a specialist communications, corporate affairs and change search firm - this is the market we work in every day, not a generalist desk picking up a comms brief between others.
stats: [N] senior communications & corporate-affairs mandates delivered in the last 24 months
[X]% of retained searches completed within [Y] weeks of briefing
[Z]% of placed leaders still in role at three years
placements: [Anonymised placement 1 - e.g. Group Head of Communications, FTSE-100 consumer brand house]
[Anonymised placement 2 - e.g. Director of Corporate Affairs, listed financial-services group]
[Anonymised placement 3 - e.g. Head of Internal Communications, global FMCG]
